summary: The dashcam footage shows a snowy roadside with several vehicles parked along the curb. A red SUV is positioned on the left side of the road, while a black sedan is seen driving past in the opposite direction. Snow covers the ground, indicating winter conditions.

events_timeline.event: A black sedan drives past the parked cars on the right side of the road.

uncertainties: Speed readings may vary slightly between frames.

risk_assessment.why: There are no apparent collisions or hazardous interactions among the vehicles.
